items.title: Digital Lending Operating Layer Initiative
items.description: Digital Lending Operating Layer Initiative is the quarter's focused investment to move Lending Product Launch Velocity and Portfolio Contribution Margin, anchored in scaling banking workflows through cleaner data, lower servicing effort, and stronger partner readiness and led through Loan Product and Servicing Engine. The quarter concentrates on data-driven banking operations, embedded-finance readiness, and lower servicing complexity so the work reads like a realistic OKR-driven investment set for a company with roughly 250 product and technology people.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase lending product launch velocity by strengthening loan product and servicing engine and making the core workflow more reliable end to end.
Increase growth quality by strengthening loan product and servicing engine and making the core workflow more reliable end to end.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase portfolio contribution margin by strengthening loan product and servicing engine and making the core workflow more reliable end to end.

productBricks.change: Extended Loan Product and Servicing Engine with domain-specific workflow improvements.
Extended Pricing and Policy Rules with domain-specific workflow improvements.
Extended Origination and Decisioning Workflow with domain-specific workflow improvements.
Extended Partner and Channel Integration Layer with domain-specific workflow improvements.

deliveryChannels.change: Introduced workflow updates in Lending Configuration and Servicing Workspace.
Introduced workflow updates in Origination and Partner API Layer.
Introduced workflow updates in Portfolio and Unit Economics Dashboard.

discoveryLinks.discoveryName: Digital Lending Operating Layer: operating discovery

items.title: Embedded Finance Partner Platform Initiative
items.description: Embedded Finance Partner Platform Initiative is the quarter's focused investment to move Partner Go-Live Time and Partner Platform ARR, anchored in scaling banking workflows through cleaner data, lower servicing effort, and stronger partner readiness and led through Partner Onboarding and Tenant Setup. The quarter concentrates on data-driven banking operations, embedded-finance readiness, and lower servicing complexity so the work reads like a realistic OKR-driven investment set for a company with roughly 250 product and technology people.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Decrease partner go-live time by improving partner onboarding and tenant setup and removing avoidable workflow friction.
Increase partner activation by strengthening partner onboarding and tenant setup and making the core workflow more reliable end to end.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase partner platform arr by strengthening partner onboarding and tenant setup and making the core workflow more reliable end to end.

productBricks.change: Extended Partner Onboarding and Tenant Setup with domain-specific workflow improvements.
Extended Multi-tenant Runtime Controls with domain-specific workflow improvements.
Extended Developer Platform and Public APIs with domain-specific workflow improvements.
Extended Webhook and Event Distribution with domain-specific workflow improvements.

deliveryChannels.change: Introduced workflow updates in Partner Operations Portal.
Introduced workflow updates in Partner Developer APIs.
Introduced workflow updates in Webhook and Event Network.

discoveryLinks.discoveryName: Embedded Finance Partner Platform: operating discovery
